subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto the Countenance and believed in God, the Lord of all worlds, that he may rest assured in what his Lord ordaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الوجه و آمن بالله رب العالمین لیطمئن یفعل مولاه و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @goodly deeds; actions
